rationale: A vivid, well-structured profile with strong scene-setting, concrete details, and a warm, credible voice. The piece clearly answers the prompt and moves smoothly from routine to history to impact. It loses a bit on simplicity and economy because some passages are slightly lyrical or repetitive, but overall it is highly effective nonfiction writing.
